slide1.title: Monitor and Control Water Consumption in Your Home
slide1.description: Innovative system for recording and monitoring water consumption in real time. Save money, care for the environment, and take control of your water resources.

feature-characteristics.title: Featured Characteristics
feature-characteristics.description: Everything you need to have total control of water in your home.

items.title: Real-Time Analysis
items.description: Visualize your water consumption instantly and make informed decisions to save.

items.title: Smart Alerts
items.description: Receive notifications about abnormal consumption, possible leaks, or high expenses.

items.title: Mobile Access
items.description: Check your data from any device, anytime and anywhere.

items.title: Cost Reduction
items.description: Identify saving opportunities and reduce your monthly bill.

items.title: Secure Data
items.description: Your information protected with the highest security standards.

items.title: Complete History
items.description: Access all your consumption history when you need it.
